zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Mainwaring於大約1070年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror"42歲，母親Maud FitzRobert43歲。他於1095年之前與Ellen Wayborn在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1119年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Mainwaring于大约1070年出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror"42岁，母亲Maud FitzRobert43岁。他于1095年之前与Ellen Wayborn在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1119年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Mainwaring was born about 1070, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror", was 42 and his mother, Maud FitzRobert, was 43. He married Ellen Wayborn before 1095, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after 1119, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Mainwaring est né environ 1070, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror", avait 42 ans et sa mère, Maud FitzRobert, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Wayborn avant 1095, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après 1119, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Mainwaring um 1070 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror" 42 und seine Mutter Maud FitzRobert 43. Er hat vor 1095 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Wayborn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 1119 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mainwaring è nato il circa 1070 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror", aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Maud FitzRobert, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Wayborn prima del 1095, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1119, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Mainwaringが約1070年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror"は42歳，母Maud FitzRobertは43歳であった。1095年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでEllen Waybornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1119年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Mainwaring(이)가 대략 1070년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror"(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud FitzRobert(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1095년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Ellen Wayborn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1119년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mainwaring nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror", tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Maud FitzRobert, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Wayborn antes 1095, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1119, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Mainwaring родился около 1070 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror" было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Maud FitzRobert, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Wayborn перед 1095 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после 1119 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Mainwaring nació aproximadamente 1070, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Randulph de Richard Meslin Warin "Conqueror", tenía 42 años y su mamá, Maud FitzRobert, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Ellen Wayborn antes de 1095, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de 1119, en su pueblo.
